title: Quest 34170 Electric Wet and Dry Grinder/One Touch Operation/Coffee, Spices, Nuts, Fruit, Vegetables, Sauces, Salsa, Dips / 80g Capacity / 2 x Interchangeable Stainless Steel Blades
features: ELECTRIC COFFEE GRINDER – This electric coffee grinder packs a powerful punch, and utilises a 200W motor that rotates the stainless steel blades to perfectly grind down your coffee beans into the perfect consistency, ready to make the best home brew possible.

ONE TOUCH OPERATION – The coffee grinder has an 80g capacity, is easy to use, and features a one touch button operation to begin the grind process. The grinder comes complete with interchangeable blades to change up the consistency of your grinds too, and 2 separate cups, one for dry foods and one for wet.

CLEAR VIEWING WINDOW – The wet & dry grinder features a clear lid that allows you to keep an eye on proceedings at all times, ensuring the beans are ground exactly how you require them. The wet & dry grinder is stainless steel in its construction, making it hardwearing and durable.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL – As well as grinding coffee beans this personal grinder is also perfect for grinding down dry products like nuts, seeds, spices, & herbs, and wet products like fruit & vegetables. This makes it a versatile kitchen appliance, and one that will be of great use to both coffee lovers and seasoned home chefs.

QUEST– Quest is the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From teppanyaki grills & waffle makers, to kettles, toasters, & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Grinds Dry & Wet Foods Compact Electric Coffee Grinder Grind coffee, nuts, spices and more using this 80W Electric Grinder. It utilises a simple one-touch operating system that allows you to simply push down on the top of the unit to begin grinding its contents. With two different grinder cups included, it is suitable not only for grinding coffee and nuts, but also for creating sauces from fruits & vegetables. Previous page Dual Flat Blades The two stainless steel blades ensures that coffee beans & more are ground to a perfect consistency. Clear Viewing Window The clear lid on the grinder allows you to monitor the progress of the grinding at all times. Two Cups Included Two 80g capacity cups are included, so you can separate wet & dry foods to be ground. Wet Grinding Blades A cross-shaped set of four blades is included for grinding sauces and other wet foods. Versatile Use Use the grinder for grinding coffee beans, nuts, spices, sauces, pesto, and much more!
